torch_pattern: torch.nn.functional.avg_pool2d(input_nchw, kernel_size=kernel_size, stride=stride, padding=torch_padding, ceil_mode=ceil_mode, count_include_pad=count_include_pad, divisor_override=divisor_override)
applicability_notes: torch_pattern_notes: Input must be permuted NCHW->NHWC and flattened to (1, 1, N*H*W, C) before the ttnn call; output is returned in flattened (1, 1, N*out_H*out_W, C) format (see golden prepare_torch_pool_input / pool_output_to_flat_nhwc). Common model usage with kernel_size=[H, W], stride=[1, 1], padding=0 is equivalent to global average pooling (torch.nn.functional.adaptive_avg_pool2d(x, 1) or x.mean(dim=(2, 3), keepdim=True)).

placement_observations.size_descriptor: activation (1, 1, N*H*W, C) with kernel_size==[H, W] (global pooling regime)

memory_config.shard_spec_template: create_sharded_memory_config(..., tile_layout=True, use_height_and_width_as_shard_shape=True); input moved via ttnn.to_memory_config(x, width_mem_config) immediately before the pool

placement_observations.source: model call sites (CNN classifier heads: global avg pool with kernel_size=[x_height, x_width], stride=[1, 1], padding=[0, 0, 0, 0])

placement_observations.size_descriptor: vision encoder outputs reshaped to (1, 1, N*H*W, C), strided pooling kernel_size==stride (token downsampling)

memory_config.layout: interleaved (default, no explicit memory_config; preceded by ttnn.permute + ttnn.reshape)

placement_observations.source: VLM call site: ttnn.permute(x, (0,2,3,1)) -> ttnn.reshape -> ttnn.avg_pool2d(kernel_size=(k,k), stride=(k,k), padding=(0,0), ceil_mode=False)
unit test: ttnn.reshape(x_tt, [1,1,h*w,1], memory_config=mem_cfg) -> ttnn.to_layout(ROW_MAJOR) -> ttnn.avg_pool2d
